ab: nacila aku atu wama tayza mizizaw tu sinawama aku.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: maduka tu ku kuku’ ni sinawama.
sakamuen niza kami, mapeci’ mabuhang ku badahung nu luma’.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: misakapah tu badahung ciniza sa, makay badahung madebay tu.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: mikelid ciama tu titi nu katalalan atu da’dac pabeli ci sinawamaan.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: i kakabi’an masasukamu kaku atu sinawama, yadah ku nipaselay niza tu kungku.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: ayaw amiliyas kaku, miseneng ci sinawama takumaw talakaw tu sa, mangaleb masumad malakapah tu.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: sakaku, “halhalen kapah tu ku kuku’ ni sinawama, anuayaw katayni i luma’ niyam midang.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
